category_title: Disciplined students performing as docile test-takers
scenario_title: Distraction by classroom materials during practice test isolation
minimal_context: Bill is taking a practice ELA test at a table in the back corner of the classroom.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time to start our practice ELA test. Please get ready at your table.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Silences his voice) Can I move my table to the back of the room, into the corner between the table and the cabinet?

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Yes, you can move your table there.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Pulls his chair into the corner, sits up, and readjusts his table to have it touch his belly, sitting tall and moving nothing but his feet.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Here is your test booklet. You can begin working now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Stretches his arms away from his body so that he touches the opposite end of his table, and then bends over to check the content of some baskets next to him.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time to start our practice ELA test. Please get ready at your table.

STUDENT: (Silences his voice) Can I move my table to the back of the room, into the corner between the table and the cabinet?

TUTOR: Yes, you can move your table there.

STUDENT: (Pulls his chair into the corner, sits up, and readjusts his table to have it touch his belly, sitting tall and moving nothing but his feet.)

TUTOR: Here is your test booklet. You can begin working now.

STUDENT: (Stretches his arms away from his body so that he touches the opposite end of his table, and then bends over to check the content of some baskets next to him.)

task.content: Taking a practice ELA test in December

context.environment: At the back of the room and into the corner between a table and a cabinet, with some baskets next to him
context.social_setting: Third-grade classroom during a practice test

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: After moving his table into the corner and stretching his arms away from his body to touch the opposite end of his table
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Started to bend over to check the content of some baskets next to him

behavior_patterns.condition: When settling into his seat for the practice test
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Sat up in his chair and soon readjusted his table to have it touch his belly. This necessitated that he sat tall and moved nothing but his feet
